description:
Gives World class features of Health Insurance like.
100% Cashless
No Co-payment, 
No Room Rent & ICU Limit, 
No Zone wise Premium,
Air Ambulance,
Health checkup Coupons every year,
Unlimited Reset Benefit,
1,2 & 3Years policy also available
10% Discount for 2years policy, 15% For 3years Policy and More.....



And this policy Is Closed And New policy Named as HEALTH ADVANTEDGE 


For more details Please contact : 9160224346 
For Policy also : 9160224346 ( Whatsapp /Telegram / call )
